channel.title: GitHub Prolog Monthly Trending
channel.description: Monthly Trending of Prolog in GitHub

item.title: xithan/LaTeX-Debug.tmbundle
item.description: Improved error messages for the "Watch document" and "Typeset & View" commands of Textmate's LaTeX bundle..

item.title: nasa-jpl/open-source-rover
item.description: A build-it-yourself, 6-wheel rover based on the rovers on Mars!
